title: taraxacum apiculatiforme
intro: Taraxacum apiculatiforme, also known as the Himalayan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and liver problems. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving liver function. Taraxacum apiculatiforme is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a fresh salad green or added to soups and stews.
